allow: PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'; $docker = Get-Command docker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($docker\) { Write-Output "DOCKER_FOUND: $\($docker.Source\)"; & docker --version; & docker info --format '{{.ServerVersion}}' } else { Write-Output "DOCKER_NOT_FOUND"; $svc = Get-Service -Name 'com.docker.service' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($svc\) { Write-Output "DESKTOP_SERVICE: $\($svc.Status\)" } else { Write-Output "DESKTOP_SERVICE: not installed" } })

PowerShell(foreach \($p in 5175,5176,4173,4200,8080,3001\) { if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Output "$p in-use" } else { Write-Output "$p FREE"; break } }; Write-Output "---PG-TEST---"; $env:PGPASSWORD = 'postgres'; & 'C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\15\\bin\\psql.exe' -U postgres -d postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -w -c "SELECT version\(\);" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = 'postgres'; & 'C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\15\\bin\\psql.exe' -U postgres -d postgres -h localhost -w -c "CREATE USER ca360 WITH PASSWORD 'ca360_dev_2026';" -c "CREATE DATABASE ca360 OWNER ca360;" -c "GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON DATABASE ca360 TO ca360;" 2>&1)
Bash(gh pr create --title 'Firm settings \(name + logo upload\) and permanent delete on clients/branches/users' --body ' *)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); & gh --version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 2; & gh auth status 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5)
